kept_spans: I'm shipping Jay Cutler just a little surprise.
Oh, yeah. I'm returning this viral lorl carnitine too.
And it's not because it doesn't work.
It's not because that's all it takes to help you use the excess in your midsection as energy.
It's not because it helps you take this stuff, push it inside the mitochondria. That way could be used up as fuel.
Not because it tastes like candy.
Not because you get thirty one servings per bottle.
Not because they've sold over forty six thousand three month supplies and have a four point seven star rating.
It's because I paid full price, the three pack is practically a buy two get one with free shipping right now.
I'll leave the link right there for you, but I just put my order in for another three months supply and it gave me a low stock warning. I would hurry.
notes: All content kept. The long pauses appear to be intentional dramatic pacing in a product review/promo script, building suspense through a 'not because X, not because Y... but because Z' structure.
